g.title: config.weight_assoc:org_unit->actor.org_unit:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (org_unit) REFERENCES actor.org_unit(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: config.weight_assoc:circ_weights->config.circ_matrix_weights:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (circ_weights) REFERENCES config.circ_matrix_weights(id) ON DELETE SET NULL DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: config.weight_assoc:hold_weights->config.hold_matrix_weights:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (hold_weights) REFERENCES config.hold_matrix_weights(id) ON DELETE SET NULL DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
